boxfit: FX BOXFITTING. Apply box fitting effect on selected images.
cartoon: FX CARTOON. Apply cartoon effect on selected images.
colors: FX COLOR ELLIPSES. Add random color ellipses to selected images.
cubism: FX CUBISM. Apply cubism effect on selected images.
draw_whirl: FX DRAW WHIRL. Apply whirl drawing effect on selected images.
drop_shadow: FX DROP SHADOW. Drop shadow behind selected images. => expand_size: 0=no, 1=yes => separate: 0=no, 1=yes
ellipsionism: FX ELLIPSIONISM. Apply ellipsionism filter to selected images.
fire_edges: FX FIRE EDGES. Generate fire effect from edges of selected images.
fractalize: FX FRACTALIZE. Randomly fractalize selected images.
glow_all: FX GLOW. Add soft glow on selected images.
halftone: FX HALFTONE. Apply halftone dithering to selected images. => Size_shape: 0=square, 1=diamond, 2=circle, 3=inv-square, 4=inv-diamond, 5=inv-circle
hardsketch: FX HARDSKETCHBW. Apply hard B&W sketch effect on selected images. => Is_fast: 0=no, 1=yes;
hearts_all: FX HEARTS. Apply heart effect on selected images.
houghsketch: FX HOUGHSKETCHBW. Apply hough B&W sketch effect on selected images.
light_relief: FX LIGHT RELIEF. Apply relief light to selected images. => Heightmap: 0=no, 1=yes;
lightray_fx: FX LIGHTRAYS. Generate ray lights from the edges of selected images.
mosaic_fx: FX MOSAIC. Create random mosaic from selected images.
old_photo: FX OLD PHOTO. Apply old photo effect on selected images. No arguments required.
pencilbw: FX PENCIL BW. Apply B&W pencil effect on selected images.
pixelsort: FX PIXELSORT. Apply a pixel sorting algorithm on selected images. => Ordering: 0=increasing, 1=decreasing; => Axis: 0=x, 1=y, 2=z, 3=xy, 4=yx;
polaroid: FX POLAROID. Create polaroid effect in selected images.
polygonize: FX POLYGONIZE. Apply polygon effect on selected images.
poster_edges: FX POSTER EDGES. Apply poster edges effect on selected images.
poster_hope: FX POSTER HOPE. Apply Hope stencil poster effect on selected images.
rodilius: FX RODILIUS. Apply rodilius (fractalius-like) filter on selected images. => Color_mode: 0=darker,1=brighter;
sketchbw: FX SKETCH BW. Apply sketch effect to selected images. => Is_boost: 0=no,1=yes; => Is_curved: 0=no,1=yes;
sponge: FX SPONGE. Apply sponge effect on selected images.
stained: FX STAINED GLASS. Generate stained glass from selected images. => Separators: 0=None, 1=Yes;
stars: FX STARS. Add random stars to selected images.
stencil: FX STENCIL. Apply stencil filter on selected images.
stencils: FX STENCIL BW. Apply B&W stencil effect on selected images.
tetris: FX TETRIS. Apply tetris effect on selected images.
warhol: FX WARHOL. Create MxN Andy Warhol-like artwork from selected images.
weave: FX WEAVE. Apply weave effect to the selected images. => Fibers_angle: 0=0deg, 1=22.5deg, 2=45deg, 3=67.5deg;
whirls: FX WHIRLS. Add random whirl texture to selected images.
area: FX AREA. Compute area of connected components in selected images. Argument(0) required. => Connectivity: 0=no, 1=yes;
areas: FX AREA FG. Compute area of connected components for non-zero values in selected images. Argument(0) required. => Connectivity: 0=no, 1=yes;
canny: FX CANNY. Locate image edges using Canny edge detector.
cracks: FX CRACKS. Draw random cracks on selected images with specified color. => Is_relief: 0=no, 1=yes;
edges: FX EDGES. Estimate contours of selected images.
fftpolar: FX FFTPOLAR. Compute fourier transform of selected images, as centered magnitude/phase images. No arguments required.
isophotes: FX ISOPHOTES. Render isophotes of selected images on a transparent background.
light_patch: FX LIGHT PATCH. Add light patches to selected images.
pixelize: FX PIXELIZE. Pixelize selected images with specified scales.
scanlines: FX SCANLINES. Apply ripple deformation on selected images. => Scanlines: 0=nlock, 1=triangle, 2=sine, 3=sine+, 4=random;
segment_water: FX SEGMENT WATERSHED. Apply watershed segmentation on selected images.
shade_stripes: FX SHADE STRIPES. Add shade stripes to selected images. => Direction: 0=horizontal, 1=vertical;
shadow_patch: FX SHADOW PATCH. Add shadow patches to selected images.
spread_all: FX SPREAD. Spread pixel values of selected images randomly along x,y and z.
stripes_y: FX STRIPES Y. Add vertical stripes to selected images.
texturize: FX TEXTURE CANVAS. Add paint canvas texture to selected images.
texturizer: FX TEXTURIZE PAPER. Add paper texture to selected images. No arguments required.
topographic: FX TOPOGRAPHIC MAP. Render selected images as topographic maps.
vignette: FX VIGNETTE. Add vignette effect to selected images.
watermark: FX WATERMARK VISIBLE. Add or remove a visible watermark on selected images. => Mode: 0=remove, 1=add;
adjust: FX ADJUST COLORS. Perform a global adjustment of colors on selected images.
bright: FX BRIGHTNESS. Change contrast of selected images, with specified strength. If strength is negative, image brightness is reduced, otherwise amplified.
cmy2rgb: FX CMY TO RGB. Convert color representation of selected images from CMY to RGB. No arguments required.
cmyk2rgb: FX CYMK TO RGB. Convert color representation of selected images from CMYK to RGB. No arguments required.
colorblind: FX COLORBLIND. Simulate color blindness vision. => Attr-type: 0=Protanopia, 1=protanomaly, 2=deuteranopia, 3=deuteranomaly, 4=tritanopia, 5=tritanomaly, 6=achromatopsia, 7=achromatomaly;
contrast: FX CONTRAST. Change contrast of selected image, with specified strength. If strength is negative, image contrast is reduced, otherwise amplified.
direction: FX DIRECTION TO RGB. Compute RGB representation of selected 2D direction fields. No arguments required.
ditheredbw: FX DITHERED BW. Create dithered B&W version of selected images. No arguments required.
gradient: FX GRADIENT TO RGB. Compute RGB representation of 2D gradient of selected images. => Orientate: 0=no, 1=yes;
lightness: FX LIGHTNESS. Compute lightness of selected sRGB images. No arguments required.
luminance: FX LUMINANCE. Compute luminance of selected sRGB images. No arguments required.
remove: FX REMOVE OPACITY. Remove opacity channel of selected images. No arguments required.
rgb2cmy: FX RGB TO CMY. Convert color representation of selected images from RGB to CMY. No arguments required.
rgb2cmyk: FX RGB TO CMYK. Convert color representation of selected images from RGB to CMYK. No arguments required.
rgb2srgb: FX RGB TO SRGB. Convert color representation of selected images from linear RGB to sRGB. No arguments required.
sepia: FX SEPIA. Apply sepia tones effect on selected images. No arguments required.
solarize: FX SOLARIZE. Solarize selected images. No arguments required.
srgb2rgb: FX SRGB TO RGB. Convert color representation of selected images from sRGB to linear RGB. No arguments required.
to_gray: FX TO GRAY. Force selected images to be in GRAY mode. No arguments required.
to_graya: FX TO GRAYA. Force selected images to be in GRAYA mode. No arguments required.
bandpass: FX BANDPASS. Apply bandpass filter to selected images.
bilateral: BILATERAL. Blur selected images by anisotropic (eventually joint/cross) bilateral filtering. Arguments (0-1) required.
blur_all: FX BLUR. Blur selected images by a Deriche or gaussian filter (recursive implementation). Argument(0) required. => Boundaries: 0=dirichlet, 1=neumann, 2=periodic, 3=mirror; => Kernel: 0=deriche, 1=gaussian;
blur_ang: FX BLUR ANGULAR. Apply angular blur on selected images. Argument(0) required.
blur_bloom: FX BLUR BLOOM. Apply a bloom filter that blend multiple blur filters of different radii. => Operator: +, max, min; => Kernel: 0=deriche, 1=gaussian, 2=box, 3=triangle, 4=quadratic; => Scales: 0=no, 1=yes;
blur_linear: FX BLUR LINEAR. Apply linear blur on selected images, with specified angle and amplitudes. Argument(0) required. => Boundary: 0=dirichlet, 1=neumann;
blur_radial: FX BLUR RADIAL. Apply radial blur on selected images. Argument(0) required.
boxfilter: FX BOXFILTER. Apply box filter to selected images. Argument(0) required. => Ordering: 0=smooth, 1=1st-derivative, 2=2nd-derivative; => Boundaries: 0=dirichlet, 1=neumann, 2=periodic, 3=mirror;
closing: FX CLOSING. Apply morphological closing to selected images. Arguments(0-1) required.
closings: FX CLOSING CIRC. Apply circular dilation of selected images by specified size. Argument(0) required. => Is_real: 0=no, 1=yes; => Boundaries: 0=dirichlet, 1=neumann, 2=periodic, 3=mirror;
curvature: FX CURVATURE. Compute isophote curvatures on selected images. No arguments required.
dilate: FX DILATE. Dilate selected images by a rectangular or the specified structuring element. Arguments(0-1) required. => Boundaries: 0=dirichlet, 1=neumann, 2=periodic, 3=mirror;
dilate_ci: FX DILATE CIRC. Apply circular dilation of selected images by specified size. Argument(0) required. => Boundaries: 0=dirichlet, 1=neumann, 2=periodic, 3=mirror;
dilate_oct: FX DILATE OCT. Apply octagonal dilation of selected images by specified size. Argument(0) required. => Boundaries: 0=dirichlet, 1=neumann, 2=periodic, 3=mirror;
dilate_thr: FX DILATE THRESHOLD. Dilate selected images in the (X,Y,Z,I) space. Arguments(0-1) required. => Boundaries: 0=dirichlet, 1=neumann, 2=periodic, 3=mirror;
erode_circ: FX ERODE CIRC. Apply circular erosion of selected images by specified size. Argument(0) required. => Boundaries: 0=dirichlet, 1=neumann, 2=periodic, 3=mirror; => Is_real: 0=no, 1=yes;
erode_oct: FX ERODE OCT. Apply octagonal erosion of selected images by specified size. Argument(0) required. => Boundaries: 0=dirichlet, 1=neumann, 2=periodic, 3=mirror; => Is_real: 0=no, 1=yes;
grid_fx: FX GRID FLOW. Draw xy-grid on selected images. Arguments(0-1) and arguments(7-8) required.
heat: FX HEAT FLOW. Apply iterations of the heat flow on selected images. => Sequence: 0=no, 1=yes;
ilapl: FX ILAPLACIAN. Invert selected Laplacian images. If given nb_iterations is 0, inversion is done in Fourier space (single iteration).
inpaint: FX INPAINT HOLES. Inpaint all connected regions having an area less than specified value. => Connect: 0=no, 1=yes;
kuwahara: FX KUWAHARA. Apply Kuwahara filter of specified size on selected images. Argument(0) required.
laplacian: FX LAPLACIAN. Compute Laplacian of selected images. No arguments required.
map_tone: FX MAP TONES. Apply tone mapping operator on selected images, based on Poisson equation.
map_tones: FX MAP TONES FAST. Apply fast tone mapping operator on selected images.
normalize: FX NORMALIZE LOCAL. Normalize selected images locally. => Is_cut: 0=no, 1=yes;
opening_all: FX OPENING. Apply morphological opening to selected images. Arguments(0,1) required.
opening_circ: FX OPENING CIRCL. Apply circular opening of selected images by specified size. Argument(0) required. => Is_real: 0=no, 1=yes;
remove_pixels: FX REMOVE PIXELS. Remove specified number of pixels (i.e. set them to 0) from the set of non-zero pixels in selected images. Argument(0) required.
rolling_guide: FX ROLLING GUIDANCE. Apply the rolling guidance filter on selected image.
sharpen_fx: FX SHARPEN. Sharpen selected images by inverse diffusion or shock filters methods. Argument(0) required.
sharpened: FX SHARPEN ALPHA. Sharpen selected images using a multi-scale and alpha boosting algorithm.
solidify: FX SOLIDIFY. Solidify selected transparent images. => Diffusion_type: 0=isotropic, 1=delaunay-guided, 2=edge-oriented;
syntext: FX SYNTEXTURIZE. Resynthetize width'x'height versions of selected micro-textures by phase randomization.
syntexts: FX SYNTEXTURIZE MATCHPATCH. Resynthetize width'x'height versions of selected micro-textures using a patch-matching algorithm.
unsharp: FX UNSHARP. Apply unsharp mask on selected images. Argument(0) required.
unsharps: FX UNSHARP OCTAVE. Apply octave sharpening on selected images.
array: FX ARRAY. Create MxN array from selected images. Argument (0) required. => Expand: 0=min, 1=max, 2=all;
array_fade: FX ARRAY FADE. Create MxN array from selected images. Argument (0) required. => Expand: 0=min, 1=max, 2=all;
array_mirror: FX ARRAY MIRROR. Create 2^Nx2^N array from selected images. Argument (0) required. => Expand: 0=x, 1=y, 2=xy, 3=tri-xy; => Expand: 0=no, 1=yes;
array_random: FX ARRAY RANDOM. Create MdxNd array of tiles from selected MsxNs source arrays. Argument (0) required.
frame_all: FX FRAME. Insert outer frame in selected images, along the specified axes. => Axes: x, y, xy;
frame_blur: FX FRAME BLUR. Draw RGBA-colored round frame in selected images.
frame_cube: FX FRAME CUBE. Insert 3D frames in selected images. => *_Side: 0=normal, 1=mirror, 2=mirror-x, 3=mirror-y, 4=mirror-xy;
frame_fuzzy: FX FRAME FUZZY. Draw RGBA-colored fuzzy frame in selected images. Argument(0) required.
frame_painting: FX FRAME PAINTING. Add a painting frame to selected images.
frame_pattern: FX FRAME PATTERNS. Insert selected pattern frame in selected images. Argument(0) required. => Constrain: 0=no, 1=yes;
frame_round: FX FRAME ROUND. Insert an inner round frame in selected images.
imagegrid: FX IMAGE GRID. Create MxN image grid from selected images. Argument(0) required.
imagegrid_he: FX IMAGEGRID HEXAGONAL. Create hexagonal grids from selected images. => Aliased: 0=yes, 1=no;
imagegrid_tri: FX IMAGEGRID TRIANGULAR. Create triangular grids from selected images. => Pattern_type: 0=horizontal, 1=vertical, 2=crossed, 3=cube, 4=decreasing, 5=increasing;
rotate_tiles: FX ROTATE TILES. Apply MxN tiled-rotation effect on selected images. Argument(0) required.
shift_tiles: FX SHIFT TILES. Apply MxN tiled-shift effect on selected images. Argument(0) required.
taquined: FX TAQUIN. Create MxN taquin puzzle from selected images. Argument(0) required. => Remove: 0=none, 1=first, 2=last, 3=random;
tunnel: FX TUNNEL. Apply tunnel effect on selected images.
channels: FX CHANNELS. Keep only specified channels of selected images. Argument(0) required. => Boundaries: 0=dirichlet, 1=neumann, 2=periodic, 3=mirror;
columns: FX COLUMNS. Keep only specified columns of selected images. Argument(0) required. => Boundaries: 0=dirichlet, 1=neumann, 2=periodic, 3=mirror;
crop_fx: FX CROP. Crop selected images with specified region coordinates. Argument(0) required. => Boundaries: 0=dirichlet, 1=neumann, 2=periodic, 3=mirror;
expand: FX EXPAND. Expand selected images along the specified axes. Arguments(0-1) required. => Boundaries: 0=dirichlet, 1=neumann; => Axis: x, y, c, xy, xc, yc, xyc;
mirrors: FX MIRROR. Mirror selected images along specified axes. Argument(0) required. => Axis: x, y, xy;
rescale2d: FX RESCALE 2D. Resize selected 2D images. Arguments(0-1) required. => Interpolate: 0=none, 1=near, 2=avg, 3=linear, 4=grid, 5=bicubic, 6=lanczos; => Intermodal: 0=inside, 1=padded, 2=outside, 3=cropped;
resize_mn: FX RESIZE MN. Resize selected images with Mitchell-Netravali filter (cubic). Argument(0) required.
resize_pow: FX RESIZE POW2. Resize selected images (power of 2). => Interpolate: 0=none, 1=near, 2=avg, 3=linear, 4=grid, 5=bicubic, 6=lanczos; => Boundaries: 0=dirichlet, 1=neumann, 2=periodic, 3=mirror;
rotate_fx: FX ROTATE. Rotate selected images with specified angle (in deg.). => Boundaries: 0=dirichlet, 1=neumann, 2=periodic, 3=mirror; => Interpolation: 0=none, 1=linear, 2=bicubic;
rotated: FX ROTATE TILEABLE. Rotate selected images by specified angle and make them tileable.
rows_fx: FX ROWS. Keep only specified rows of selected images. Argument(0) required. => Boundaries: 0=dirichlet, 1=neumann, 2=periodic, 3=mirror;
scale2x: FX SCALE 2X. Double XY-size of selected images, using the Scale2x algorithm. No arguments required.
scale3x: FX SCALE 3X. Triple XY-size of selected images, using the Scale3x algorithm. No arguments required.
scale_dc: FX SCALE DCCI 2X. Double XY-size of selected images, using a directional cubic convolution interpolation. => Extend: 0=no, 1=yes;
seamcarve: FX SEAMCARVE. Resize selected images with specified 2D geometry, using the seam-carving algorithm. Argument(0) required. => Is_priority: 0=no, 1=yes; => Antialiasing: 1=no, 0=yes;
shrink_fx: FX SHRINK. Shrink selected images along the specified axes. Arguments(0-1) required. => Axes: x, y, c, xy, xc, yc, xyc; => Boundary: 0=dirichlet, 1=neumann;
undistort: FX UNDISTORT. Correct barrel/pincushion distortions occurring with wide-angle lens. => Boundaries: 0=dirichlet, 1=neumann, 2=periodic, 3=mirror;
upscale: FX UPSCALE SMART. Upscale selected images with an edge-preserving algorithm. Argument(0) required.
deform: FX DEFORM. Apply random smooth deformation on selected images. => Interpolation: 0=none, 1=linear, 2=bicubic; => Boundaries: 0=dirichlet, 1=neumann, 2=periodic, 3=mirror;
equirect: FX EQUIRECTANGULAR 2 NADIRZENITH. Transform selected equirectangular images to nadir/zenith rectilinear projections. No arguments required.
euclidean: FX EUCLIDEAN TO POLAR. Apply euclidean to polar transform on selected images. => Boundaries: 0=dirichlet, 1=neumann, 2=periodic, 3=mirror;
fisheye: FX FISHEYE. Apply fish-eye deformation on selected images.
flower: FX FLOWER. Apply flower deformation on selected images. => Boundaries: 0=dirichlet, 1=neumann, 2=periodic, 3=mirror;
kaleidos: FX KALEIDOSCOPE. Create kaleidoscope effect from selected images. => Boundaries: 0=dirichlet, 1=neumann, 2=periodic, 3=mirror;
map_sphere: FX MAP SPHERE. Map selected images on a sphere.
nadirzenith: FX NADIRZNITH TO EQUIRECTANGULAR. Transform selected nadir/zenith rectilinear projections to equirectangular images. No arguments required.
polar2euclid: FX POLAR TO EUCLIDEAN. Apply euclidean to polar transform on selected images. => Boundaries: 0=dirichlet, 1=neumann, 2=periodic, 3=mirror;
raindrops: FX RAINDROPS. Apply raindrops deformation on selected images.
ripple: FX RIPPLE. Apply ripple deformation on selected images. => Shape: 0=block, 1=triangle, 2=sine, 3=sine+, 4=random;
rotoidos: FX ROTOIDOSCOPE. Create rotational kaleidoscope effect from selected images. => Boundaries: 0=dirichlet, 1=neumann, 2=periodic, 3=mirror;
spherize: FX SPHERIZE. Apply spherize effect on selected images. => Interpolate: 0=none, 1=nearest, 2=average, 3=linear, 4=grid, 5=bicubic, 6=lanczos;
symmetrize: FX SYMMETRIZE. Symmetrize selected images regarding specified axis. => Boundaries: 0=dirichlet, 1=neumann, 2=periodic, 3=mirror; => Antisymmetry: 0=no, 1=yes; => Swap_sides: 0=no, 1=yes;
transform: FX TRANSFORM POLAR. Apply user-defined transform on polar representation of selected images. => Boundaries: 0=dirichlet, 1=neumann, 2=periodic, 3=mirror;
twirl_fx: FX TWIRL. Apply twirl deformation on selected images. => Boundaries: 0=dirichlet, 1=neumann, 2=periodic, 3=mirror;
warped: FX WARP PERSPECTIVE. Warp selected images with perspective deformation. => Boundaries: 0=dirichlet, 1=neumann, 2=periodic, 3=mirror;
water: FX WATER. Apply water deformation on selected images.
wave: FX WAVE. Apply wave deformation on selected images.
wind: FX WIND. Apply wind effect on selected images.
zoom: FX ZOOM. Apply zoom factor to selected images. => Boundaries: 0=dirichlet, 1=neumann, 2=periodic, 3=mirror;

3: GLOBAL FILE PICKER png and json
LOCAL FILE PICKER png and json
TOGGLE REALTIME FX application on files
SELECT THEME from a predefined palette
SELECT THEME from a predefined palette
